Lab Meeting Presentation on Forman et al (2019)

November 12, 2019

I gave a presentation on the paper “Randomized controlled trial of OnTrack, a just-in-time adaptive intervention designed to enhance weight loss” by Evan M. Forman et al (2019), with Gary D. Foster.

Date: 12 November, 2019
Event: CCS lab meeting
Location: Seoul, South Korea
Paper: Link
Slides: Download pdf
